body:
I asked Claude to add this feature. There are other functions that support passing dates to them such as `ClimaAnalysis.select` and `ClimaAnalysis.slice`. This PR puts `resampled_as` on the same footing by allowing function calls like `resampled_as(var, time = [Dates.DateTime(2010)])`.

TODO

- [x] Check the code, docs, and tests
title: Support passing dates for Var.resampled_as
